scripts.release:patch: pnpm version patch -m 'chore(release): %s' && git push --follow-tags && pnpm publish --access public
scripts.release:minor: pnpm version minor -m 'chore(release): %s' && git push --follow-tags && pnpm publish --access public
scripts.release:major: pnpm version major -m 'chore(release): %s' && git push --follow-tags && pnpm publish --access public
